description_long: This object is a compact, curved knife with a distinctive karambit-style blade, featuring a pronounced blue arc and a sharp, pointed tip. The blade is single-edged and smoothly transitions into a robust, angular black handle. The handle includes a hexagonal blue ring at the end, commonly used for improved grip and control, especially in tactical or utility scenarios. The handle appears textured for enhanced grip, and the overall design is ergonomic, fitting comfortably in the hand. The color scheme is striking, with a matte black handle contrasting against the vibrant blue blade and ring. There are no visible decorative engravings or ornamentation, giving the knife a modern, utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, curved karambit-style knife with a blue blade, black textured handle, and a blue hexagonal ring for grip. The design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the curved blue blade, black handle, and the blue hexagonal ring at the handle's end.
description_view_1: The top-down view shows the slim profile of the knife, emphasizing the narrowness of the blade and handle.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the full curve of the blade and the handle's ergonomic shape with the blue ring.
description_view_3: The bottom-up view reveals the flatness of the handle and blade, with the blue and black color contrast clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: angular, textured black handle with blue hexagonal finger ring
